subcodes.first_line: O maidservant who is near unto the celestial Threshold! Although a letter hath already been written unto thee, it may be that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز مقربه درگاه کبریا هر چند از پیش نامه ای بشما مرقوم گردید شاید که
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @role and station of women, @service to others; to the Cause of God
